summary: DHT11 temperature and humidity sensor on a single bidirectional data line.
c_init_template: /* DHT11 frame decoding still needs us-level timing in the app layer. */
notes: DHT11 uses a single-wire bidirectional protocol that needs microsecond timing.
This template provides the bus primitives and line-state helpers; the full timing-sensitive frame decode still belongs in the application layer.

read_and_log.description: Periodically trigger DHT11 read and log temperature/humidity

run: /* Frame decode uses microsecond timing — see DHT11 datasheet. */

sources: DHT11 datasheet in the Blue Bridge Cup STM32G4 resource package
